productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Classic Maroon Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this lino perros clutch, customised for the glam diva in you. Show off your classy style with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Dimensions : 12 cm X 25 cm Made of textured fabric with a fabric lining One main compartment with a steel clasp One compartment inside the main compartment Detachable chain strap for ease of carrying Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
